headline: Healthcare Stocks Are Trading at a Deep Discount. Eli Lilly and Others Are Worth a Look.
summary: Investors have ignored healthcare as they’ve tried to capture earnings momentum in AI-related semiconductor stocks.

headline: Here's Why You Should Hold Stryker Stock in Your Portfolio for Now
summary: Stryker rides on double-digit growth and robotics demand into 2026, but tariffs, vascular weakness and international hurdles cloud its near-term outlook.
